title: Pleurothallis renieana
taxonomy: Pleurothallis renieana is classified as a species of orchid, specifically within the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Pleurothallis, which consists of terrestrial orchids native to Central and South America. This genus is further divided into several subgenera, and Pleurothallis renieana is part of one of them. The classification of Pleurothallis renieana at the species level is currently recognized by botanical authorities. Further research may be needed to confirm its classification and any potential subcategorizations.
uses: Pleurothallis renieana is a species of orchid that has been studied for its potential medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
